name: Kindle
description: A Tediore SMG from a fixed-element set that always spawns with an elemental barrel, giving it unusually strong damage-over-time and status chance for its tier. Because its parts are locked, it appears far less often than its item colour suggests and is easy to overlook. Even at lower rarities, its reliable elemental uptime can carry fights well until a stronger unique weapon replaces it.
notes: Other Tediore SMGs in this fixed-element set include Chaff for slag, Green for corrosive, and Spark for shock. The Kindle only appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable world-drop sources.
